race.comment: BEEARETEE (7) just over three weeks between runs when he gripped on in the heavy (8) going to finish fourth over 1600m at this track. Gets map favours again and expected to go close dropping further in trip. ARCHIE MAXIMUS (2) was rewarded for his consistency third-up with a dominant Maiden victory over 1180m at Grafton. Should have little trouble running the trip from the inside draw. Shapes as the main danger. AUSTRALASIA (3) jumped quickly in trip on the back-up with a fast finishing second over 1400m at this track in the heavy (8) going. Look for her late. OUR SPARKY (10) slashing return from back in the field with a handy third over 1260m at Ballina. Desperate to get out in trip and looks set for a good prep. Claim helps.
